disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A wet, gurgling cough began immediately after the resident was fed his pureed lunch
trigger_question_examples: What was he doing just before it began?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started the moment we were feeding him his pureed lunch — a wet, gurgling cough came on straight away and hasn't stopped.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fever with chills developed over the following few hours
trigger_question_examples: Has he been shivering or hot?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, over the last few hours he's spiked a high fever, up to 38.6, and he's been shivering.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive fast, laboured breathing with low measured oxygen levels
trigger_question_examples: Do you have an oxygen reading for him?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His breathing has got faster and harder — about 26 a minute — and the oximeter is only reading 89% on room air. He's using his neck and chest muscles to breathe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thick discoloured sputum and foul-smelling breath
trigger_question_examples: Is he bringing anything up when he coughs?
Have you noticed anything about his breath or phlegm?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's bringing up thick, discoloured phlegm and his breath smells really foul.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known longstanding swallowing and feeding difficulty from an advanced neurological condition, with recent weight loss
trigger_question_examples: Does he have any trouble swallowing normally?
What is his usual medical background?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He has an advanced neurological condition that affects his swallowing and speech. He's been on a pureed diet and has been losing weight — about 3 kg this past month from feeding trouble.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He was fed lying fairly flat, with the head of the bed down
trigger_question_examples: What position was he in when he was fed?
Was the head of his bed up during the meal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, the head of his bed was flat — he was fed lying pretty flat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He looks flushed and sweaty and appears more distressed than his usual baseline
trigger_question_examples: How does he look to you right now?
Is this different from his normal state?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He looks flushed and sweaty and he's clearly more distressed and working harder than he normally does.
